title: Vexlyre
body: Vexlyre is a PvP Texturepack edited from [Renzlyre](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/renzlyre) given it's insane success (check that out too if you want :P) This texturepack features quality of life changes like bordered ores and lower fire alongside great looking textures to enhance your gameplay like: - Wood, Stone, Iron, Diamond and Netherite armor and tools with netherite having a cool purple shade :D - Golden Apples - Bow and Crossbow - Particles (Critical and Sweep Hits, removed Explosion Particles) - Shield - Enchantment Glint _and there is still a lot to come_
